title: crinum stracheyi
intro: Crinum stracheyi, also known as the Tiger Lily, is a species of flowering plant in the Amaryllidaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Crinum stracheyi include relief from fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antispasmodic. In herbal preparations, the plant's bulbs are often used to make decoctions or infusions, which can be consumed as a treatment for various ailments.
